items.name: House Special Vermicelli
items.description: Pick two choices of proteins (pork, beef, or chicken). Serve with shrimp (2), choice of spring rolls (2), veggies, peanut, green onion oil, and fish sauce.
items.simplified_description: A vermicelli dish with your choice of two proteins and shrimp, served with spring rolls and various toppings.

items.name: Grilled (Chicken/Pork/Beef) Vermicelli
items.description: Pick your choice of protein (pork, beef, or chicken). Serve with your choice of spring rolls (2), veggies, peanut, green onion oil, and fish sauce.
items.simplified_description: A grilled vermicelli dish with your choice of protein and spring rolls, served with various toppings.

items.name: Spring Roll (4)
items.description: Choice of pork, shrimp or vegetarian spring rolls with choice of sauce. (Fish sauce, sweet chili sauce).
items.simplified_description: Four spring rolls with your choice of filling and dipping sauce.
